error_signature: returned HTML instead of MCP server response
title: Incorrect response from MCP server endpoint
symptom: When trying to access the MCP server, the response is HTML indicating the n8n Editor UI instead of the expected JSON response.
applies_when: Using a devtunnel or proxy to access MCP
MCP server is enabled and configured
not_this_if: Direct access to MCP server without a tunnel works correctly
root_cause: The request is likely being routed incorrectly, often due to the tunnel or proxy not preserving the path to the MCP server endpoint, leading to a fallback to the default n8n Editor UI.
fix_steps: Add the header 'X-Tunnel-Skip-Anti-Phishing-Page' to your request.
Include 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' in your request headers.
Verify that the tunnel forwards '/mcp-server/http' unchanged to the correct local address.
agent_instruction: Add the necessary headers to your request to ensure proper routing to the MCP server.
